title: TSA Workers Get Paid After Long Wait
summary: TSA workers who check bags at airports had to work for 44 days without getting paid. Now, they are starting to receive their back pay because the President ordered it. But many workers are still having a hard time. Some are sick or cannot pay their bills because they had no money for weeks. Airports have long lines because there are not enough workers. Angela Grana, a TSA worker from Colorado, got her paycheck today. She says it has been very tough for her and others to work without pay for so long. They had to find ways to manage with no income, which caused a lot of stress and problems.

the leader of the country who makes big decisions

questions.question: How many days did TSA workers work without pay?
Who ordered the TSA workers to get paid?
What are TSA workers starting to receive?
Why are airports having long lines?
What problem are some TSA workers still facing?

background_read: TSA stands for Transportation Security Administration. They are workers at airports who help keep travelers safe by checking bags and people. Sometimes, workers do not get paid on time, which can make it hard for them to buy food or pay for their homes. In this story, TSA workers had to wait a long time for their money, causing stress and problems at airports.
Article_Structure: WHO: TSA workers and Angela Grana, a TSA officer from Colorado
WHAT: TSA workers are getting back pay after 44 days without pay, but many still face challenges like bills and sickness
WHERE: Airports in the United States
WHY: Because they worked without pay for weeks, causing financial stress and airport delays

perspectives.description: TSA workers like Angela Grana feel relieved to get paid but are still struggling with bills and stress from the long wait.
